member.name: T:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.BackgroundServices.PerfMonitorService
member.summary: Background service that emits CPU %, RAM MB, and active request counts every 60 seconds.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.BackgroundServices.PerfMonitorService._EmitSnapshot
member.summary: Emits a performance snapshot to the logger.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.BackgroundServices.PerfMonitorService._MeasureCpu
member.summary: Measures CPU usage using platform-specific method.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.BackgroundServices.PerfMonitorService._MeasureLinuxCpu
member.summary: Reads /proc/stat for system-wide CPU usage (the only reliable source in containers). Returns delta-based percentage since the previous call.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.BackgroundServices.PerfMonitorService._ReadLinuxCpuTimes(System.Int64@,System.Int64@)
member.summary: Parses the first "cpu" line from /proc/stat. Format: cpu user nice system idle iowait irq softirq steal ...

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.BackgroundServices.PerfMonitorService._MeasureProcessCpu
member.summary: Fallback for non-Linux (dev machines): rough per-process CPU estimate.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Controllers.Features.V1.Products.ProductController.GetProductPaginated(BaseCleanArchitecture.Application.Features.V1.Products.Queries.GetProducts.GetProductsQuery)
member.summary: Get the paginated product list

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Controllers.Features.V1.Products.ProductController.GetProductById(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get product by id

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Controllers.Features.V1.Products.ProductController.CreateProduct(BaseCleanArchitecture.Application.Features.V1.Products.Commands.CreateProduct.CreateProductCommand)
member.summary: Create product

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Controllers.Features.V1.Products.ProductController.UpdateProduct(BaseCleanArchitecture.Application.Features.V1.Products.Commands.UpdateProduct.UpdateProductCommand)
member.summary: Update product

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Controllers.Features.V1.Products.ProductController.DeleteProduct(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete product

member.name: T:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Extensions.SerilogExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for configuring Serilog logging.

member.name: F:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Extensions.SerilogExtensions.DefaultSectionName
member.summary: Default configuration section name for logger settings.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Extensions.SerilogExtensions.UseSerilogFromSettings(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Configures Serilog using settings from the specified configuration section.
member.param: The configuration section name containing Serilog settings. Defaults to "LoggerSettings".
member.returns: The configured host builder for chaining.

member.name: T:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Middlewares.RequestTrackingMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that tracks active HTTP requests by category.

member.name: F:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Middlewares.RequestTrackingMiddleware.IngestionSegments
member.summary: URL segments that indicate ingestion operations.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Middlewares.RequestTrackingMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Processes the request, tracking its lifecycle in the activity counter.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Middlewares.RequestTrackingMiddleware.Classify(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpRequest)
member.summary: Classifies the request into Query, Ingestion, or None category.

member.name: T:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Monitoring.RequestActivityCounter
member.summary: Lock-free atomic counters for tracking in-flight HTTP requests.

member.name: P:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Monitoring.RequestActivityCounter.ActiveQueryRequests
member.summary: Gets the current count of active query requests.

member.name: P:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Monitoring.RequestActivityCounter.ActiveIngestionRequests
member.summary: Gets the current count of active ingestion requests.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Monitoring.RequestActivityCounter.IncrementQuery
member.summary: Increments the query request counter atomically.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Monitoring.RequestActivityCounter.DecrementQuery
member.summary: Decrements the query request counter atomically.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Monitoring.RequestActivityCounter.IncrementIngestion
member.summary: Increments the ingestion request counter atomically.

member.name: M:BaseCleanArchitecture.Api.Monitoring.RequestActivityCounter.DecrementIngestion
member.summary: Decrements the ingestion request counter atomically.
